text: There is a palpable stillness here, as if I am lingering on the threshold between creativity and contemplation. The silence and emptiness of the space around me spark curiosity within. The words 'R+D' emblazoned on the wall invite me to reflect on the relentless push for progress, the dance of research and development. I feel small yet invigorated in this place devoted to inquiry, surrounded by symbols of ingenuity. It is a quiet moment of anticipation, as if I am waiting for an idea—or a conversation—to begin.
